mentions.note: CEO Nesh Aor: 1,200 customer interactions in 6 weeks post-mythos; Sasocalypse officially dead. Consolidation/platformization model winning; Cyber Arc acquisition critical.
Investing Club holding reporting after close Tuesday; stock rallied into quarter—typical pattern sees profit-taking post-earnings; cyber threat extreme, company value clear, but valuation extended.
April 2023 cybersecurity sell-off (driven by Tenable weakness) created exceptional buying opportunity; stock roared higher over following months despite sector pessimism.

Strong uptrend since late Feb with higher highs/lows; broke resistance on strong volume; MACD bullish crossover; aggressive institutional buying via CMF; target $235-$280; Nikesh Arora executing well.
